form.formComment: Suited by inside box. Last start finished 5th in a Grade 6 on April 12 over 400m at this track behind Cool Blue You beaten 7 lengths (23.22). Leading chance who should prove hard to beat.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at Angle Park (31.33) in a Grade 6, finishing a 9 length sixth. Goes well out of this box with a win and two minors. With even luck and a clean start should be thereabouts.

form.formComment: Scored by 4.5 lengths last time (22.85) in a TG1-4W over 400m at this track. Has performed well off the draw with a win and two places from four starts. Looks a key chance on best form.
